title: Mainesa
compiled_truth: Mainesa is an external contact at [Natfuel](companies/natfuel). Over the corpus period (2001-05-17 to 2002-01-10), Mainesa sent 26 and received 4 emails, totalling 30 interactions. Top correspondents: [Darren Espey](people/darren-espey) (24), [Paul Tate](people/paul-tate) (20), [Chris Germany](people/chris-germany) (17), [Hormeljw](people/hormeljw-bp) (1), [George Caouette](people/george-caouette-br-inc) (1).
